title: VSB STB - CEC and HDMI Behavior
precondition: STB onboarding is completed. User is logged into the Sjónvarp Símans experience. STB is connected to TV using HDMI. Remote is paired and responsive. TV supports HDMI CEC. CEC state is known before testing. Playable content is available.

steps.step: Verify Sjónvarp Símans home experience is displayed
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed

steps.step: Open Stillingar
steps.data: Press LEFT arrow on remote and navigate to Stillingar
steps.expectedResult: Settings screen opens

steps.step: Open Tækið settings
steps.expectedResult: Device settings screen opens

steps.step: Enable CEC if not already enabled
steps.expectedResult: CEC setting is enabled successfully

steps.step: Enable CEC standby control if not already enabled
steps.expectedResult: CEC standby control is enabled successfully

steps.step: Put STB into standby using remote Power button
steps.expectedResult: STB enters standby and TV follows expected CEC standby behavior

steps.step: Wake STB using remote Power button
steps.expectedResult: STB wakes successfully and HDMI signal returns to the TV

steps.step: Verify Sjónvarp Símans home experience after wake
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen or expected resume screen is displayed

steps.step: Press TV button on remote
steps.expectedResult: TV input or HDMI behavior follows expected CEC behavior for the test environment

steps.step: Return to Sjónvarp Símans home experience
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed

steps.step: Disable CEC
steps.expectedResult: CEC setting is disabled successfully

steps.step: Press TV button on remote
steps.expectedResult: TV input selection opens so HDMI input can be changed without using the TV remote

steps.step: Return to Sjónvarp Símans home experience
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed

steps.step: Start live TV playback
steps.expectedResult: Live TV playback starts successfully with audio and video

steps.step: Disconnect HDMI cable from TV or STB
steps.data: Perform only if safe for the test environment
steps.expectedResult: TV loses HDMI signal and STB remains stable

steps.step: Reconnect HDMI cable
steps.expectedResult: HDMI signal returns and STB output is visible again

steps.step: Verify playback or recover playback after HDMI reconnect
steps.expectedResult: Playback continues or can be restarted successfully with audio and video

steps.step: Restart STB
steps.data: Use configured restart option for the test environment
steps.expectedResult: STB restarts successfully

steps.step: Verify HDMI signal after reboot
steps.expectedResult: HDMI signal returns after reboot and startup screen or Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed

steps.step: Verify audio and video after reboot
steps.expectedResult: Audio and video work correctly after reboot
